backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a cemetery record management system defining data types (GraveRecord, DeceasedPerson, GraveOwner, etc.) and site content types, with sorting utilities and mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two admin-panel features: editing a grave's plot number/alley and deleting a grave record, both with confirmation dialogs, mapped to their affected frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summaries of all frontend source files describing the purpose and key changes of each component, hook, and page in the React application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to the cemetery management system and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/publish-live.build64.txt: CI/CD deployment marker file for build 64 with no functional changes, used solely to trigger a Live deployment.
frontend/redeploy-trigger.build63.txt: CI/CD redeploy trigger file for build 63 with no functional changes, created to force a new build artifact after a deployment error.
frontend/redeploy-trigger.build64.txt: CI/CD redeploy trigger file for build 64 with no functional changes, used to produce a new build artifact for the pipeline.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component managing actor initialization with timeout-based error detection, identity/auth state, profile setup modal, and conditional rendering of public vs. admin views.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-screen access denied component shown to authenticated but unauthorized users, providing a logout button that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/components/ActorInitializat: Error screen displayed when the backend actor fails to initialize, offering a retry button with loading state and troubleshooting tips.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminGrave: Renders an interactive tile-based cemetery map grouped by alleys, color-coded by grave status, with click-to-edit functionality via GraveEditDialog and lazy-mounted alley rows.
frontend/src/components/admin/CemeteryLa: Admin UI for managing cemetery layout, allowing administrators to add/remove alleys and graves with confirmation dialogs and loading states.
frontend/src/components/admin/GraveEditD: A dialog form for creating or editing a grave record, supporting fields for location, status, owner, deceased persons, and payment date, with delete confirmation and location-change handling.
frontend/src/components/admin/GraveManag: Admin component for managing graves with infinite-scroll pagination, debounced in-memory full-text search, and a lazily-loaded dialog for creating/editing grave records.
frontend/src/components/admin/imageEditi: Utility module providing helper functions to load images, convert files to data URLs, and resize images to fit within max dimensions using an HTML canvas, returning a JPEG Uint8Array.
frontend/src/components/admin/ImageUploa: Reusable image upload component that resizes the selected file before saving it as an ExternalBlob, with upload progress tracking and support for removing the current image.
frontend/src/components/admin/ManagerDel: Boss-only admin panel for granting and revoking manager access by Principal ID, displaying the current boss and a list of delegated managers.
Admin component that generates and downloads a printable A4 HTML/PDF document listing all cemetery graves grouped by alley, including deceased persons, owner, status, and payment date.
frontend/src/components/admin/SiteConten: Admin form for editing all site content sections (hero, parish footer, prayer, cemetery info, and logo/hero images), syncing state from the backend and saving updates via mutations.
frontend/src/components/ConnectionStatus: Banner component that displays connection status (checking, disconnected) with a retry button, using the backend health check hook to detect actor or network errors.
frontend/src/components/FloatingLoginCon: A floating action button fixed to the bottom-right corner that triggers Internet Identity login, disabling itself during the login process.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer that fetches and displays parish info including name, address, mass times, contact details, social links, and a bank account number with copy-to-clipboard functionality.
A modal dialog that displays detailed information about a selected grave, including its location, payment status, and list of deceased persons, with status-based color theming.
frontend/src/components/GraveResultsList: Renders a paginated list of grave search results for both admin (full records) and public (limited) views, with status badges, lazy-loaded edit dialog, and a load-more button.
frontend/src/components/GraveSearch.tsx: Search interface that fetches all graves and performs debounced, in-memory full-text filtering for both admin and public users, rendering results via GraveResultsList.
frontend/src/components/GraveTileMap.tsx: Renders a visual tile-based cemetery map organized by alleys, showing each grave as a colored tile based on its payment status, with a legend and clickable detail card.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header displaying the parish logo (custom or fallback), title, a theme toggle button, and a logout button when the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the homepage hero section with a background image, headline, and intro paragraph fetched from public site content, with loading skeletons and an error banner fallback.
frontend/src/components/LazyMount.tsx: A wrapper component that defers mounting its children until they are near the viewport using an IntersectionObserver hook, with optional placeholder support.
frontend/src/components/PrivatePreviewBa: Displays a top-of-page amber alert banner indicating the app is running in Private Preview Mode for internal testing only.
frontend/src/components/PrivatePreviewGa: Blocks access to public content in Private Preview Mode by showing a login card that triggers Internet Identity authentication when the user is unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email, then saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/PublicSectionsTi: Renders a grid of four navigation tiles (map, search, prayer, about) that call an onSelect callback with the chosen section ID when clicked.
frontend/src/components/SiteContentLoadE: A small amber alert banner component used to notify users that site content failed to load and default information is being displayed.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated identities, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuthorization: Queries the backend for the current user's access role and returns flags indicating whether they are a boss, manager, or otherwise authorized admin.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendHealthCheck: Periodically polls the backend health check endpoint and exposes connection status ('checking', 'connected', 'disconnected') along with a manual recheck function.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Generic hook that delays propagating a value update until after a specified debounce delay (default 300ms).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context via a React provider and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useInView.ts: Uses IntersectionObserver to detect when a referenced DOM element enters the viewport, with optional triggerOnce and configurable threshold/rootMargin.
frontend/src/hooks/usePrivatePreviewMode: Manages a private preview mode flag that can be enabled or disabled via URL hash parameters, persisting the state in sessionStorage for the browser session.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend data fetching and mutations (graves, cemetery state, site content, user profiles, etc.) using the shared actor instance.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, tile surfaces, sidebar), and smooth theme transition styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page with lazy-loaded tabbed sections for grave management, cemetery map, layout, search, PDF export, site content, and (for boss-role users) manager delegation.
frontend/src/pages/PublicPage.tsx: Public-facing page combining a hero section, navigation tiles, tabbed grave search and map views, and conditionally rendered prayer/cemetery info sections loaded from site content.
frontend/src/utils/authErrors.ts: Utility functions for classifying backend error messages into categories: boss-lock, manager auth, general authorization, connectivity, and access-control initialization errors.
frontend/src/utils/graveFullTextSearch.t: Provides functions to build normalized search indexes and perform in-memory full-text search over admin GraveRecord, public PublicGraveShape, and public PublicGraveResult collections.
frontend/src/utils/graveStatusStyles.ts: Exports helper functions that map GraveStatus enum values to consistent Tailwind CSS classes and badge variants for backgrounds, hover rings, labels, and legend colors.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations, while enabling dark mode and including typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Cemetery Management App project, recording existing features (grave plot number editing and grave deletion from the admin panel/map) and a pending action request to implement those two capabilities.
